title: galenia pallens
intro: Galenia pallens, also known as "White Sage", is a type of succulent plant native to South Africa, characterized by its small white flowers and silvery-gray leaves. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, including bronchitis and asthma. Galenia pallens is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
